ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "rural_urban_code_1993" INTEGER /* Rural-urban continuum code for the county in 1993 */,
  "population_2020" INTEGER /* Population of the county in 2020 */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county's centroid */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the county (e.g., UTC-8) */,
  "elevation_ft" INTEGER /* Elevation of the county in feet */,
  "land_area_sq_km" REAL /* Land area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "water_area_sq_km" REAL /* Water area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "bordering_states" TEXT /* Bordering states (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_rural_urban_code_1993 FOREIGN KEY ("rural_urban_code_1993") REFERENCES rural_urban_codes ("code_value")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code of the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the state is located */,
  "population_2020" INTEGER /* Population of the state in 2020 */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the state */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the state was admitted to the Union */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rural_urban_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code */,
  "code_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rural-urban continuum code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "rural_urban_code" INTEGER /* Rural-urban continuum code for the year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county for the year */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers for the year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county for the year */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the county for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_history_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the data source */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_data_sources" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_data_sources_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_metro_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "metro_status" TEXT /* Metro status of the county (e.g., Metro, Non-metro) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metro status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_metro_status_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the population */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the population */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_education" (
  "edu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "high_school_graduates" INTEGER /* Number of high school graduates */,
  "bachelor_degree_holders" INTEGER /* Number of bachelor degree holders */,
  "graduate_degree_holders" INTEGER /* Number of graduate degree holders */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Student-teacher ratio in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_education_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_economic_indicators" (
  "econ_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross domestic product (GDP) of the county */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate of the county */,
  "average_wage" REAL /* Average wage in the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the county */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("econ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_economic_indicators_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_healthcare" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "hospitals" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals in the county */,
  "clinics" INTEGER /* Number of clinics in the county */,
  "physicians_per_100000" REAL /* Number of physicians per 100,000 population */,
  "nurses_per_100000" REAL /* Number of nurses per 100,000 population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_healthcare_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_environment" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index of the county */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index of the county */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use classification (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  "recycling_rate" REAL /* Recycling rate of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_environment_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_details" TEXT /* Details of the query executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Table name */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Read access flag */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Write access flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_perm_id FOREIGN KEY ("perm_id") REFERENCES permissions ("perm_id")
)
